assertionResults.title: should generate tokens with undefined {userId}

assertionResults.title: should generate tokens with empty string {userId}

assertionResults.title: should generate tokens with numeric {userId}

assertionResults.fullName: generateTokens(userId) should throw error when ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET is missing
assertionResults.title: should throw error when ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET is missing

assertionResults.title: should throw error when REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET is missing

assertionResults.title: should throw error when REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET is empty

assertionResults.fullName: generateTokens(userId) should generate unique tokens on each call
assertionResults.title: should generate unique tokens on each call

assertionResults.fullName: generateTokens(userId) should include standard JWT claims
assertionResults.title: should include standard JWT claims

assertionResults.fullName: generateTokens(userId) should generate tokens in valid JWT format
assertionResults.title: should generate tokens in valid JWT format

assertionResults.title: should not decode access token with refresh secret
